goal: disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z) = (open_upper_ray(lower).contains(x) and open_upper_ray(lower).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not open_upper_ray(lower).contains(z))
proof: function(x0: lib(set).Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(open_upper_ray(lower), x, y, z)
function(x0: lib(set).Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(open_upper_ray(lower))
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(open_upper_ray(lower), x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)

let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(open_lower_ray(upper), w0, w3, k3) } }

let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(open_lower_ray(upper), w0, w3, w5) }
